top_signals.title: How Ukraine Put Russia on the Backfoot
top_signals.summary:
Ukraine’s expanding use of drones at all ranges has changed the war’s momentum. This episode examines how Kyiv is reaching deeper into Russian territory, disrupting operations and logistics as well as energy infrastructure. How is Russia adapting (or not)? Can these strikes produce lasting advantages on the battlefield? Will this force Russia to escalate? Mike Kofman and Dara Massicot join Ryan to discuss.This episode is brought to you by Booz Allen. Learn more at warontherocks.com/boozallen.Image: ArmyInform

The post How Ukraine Put Russia on the Backfoot appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Flow Traders pilots Lombard’s new bitcoin-backed credit strategy for stablecoin borrowing
top_signals.summary: Lombard Finance is launching its Bitcoin Onchain Credit Strategy with Flow Traders as the pilot partner.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Brent crude is back at $100 — and Trump renews tariffs
top_signals.summary: Houthi strikes on Saudi tankers pushed Brent past $100 and Treasury yields to an 18-month high, while an AI spending jitters punished Tesla and Alphabet.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: LayerZero, Keeta enable tokenized bank deposits across Ethereum, Solana and Base
top_signals.summary: LayerZero and Keeta have partnered to enable native transfers of tokenized bank deposits across Ethereum, Solana, Base, and Keeta.

top_signals.title: How Abhijeet Dipke became the face of India’s first Gen Z protest movement
top_signals.summary: Over the past three days, ​tens of thousands have gathered in New Delhi demanding the resignation of India's education minister, and at the center of it all is Abhijeet Dipke.

top_signals.title: Fincantieri Celebrates Delivery of Third Explora Luxury Travel Vessel
top_signals.summary: Explora Journeys celebrated the delivery of Explora III at Fincantieri's Sestri Ponente shipyard in Genoa. The vessel is the third ship built by Fincantier for Explora Journeys, MSC Group's luxury ocean travel brand.Held in the presence of national…
